h2bf8e505geaddg4631g8c81gd1e1645ebb90: Come now, dear child. It is time to repent.
h2d3a47d8ge9b0g42a9gac26gcb27f71b964f: Hurry up and hit me already.
haece99dag4badg4bcdgbaccg963e1885aeb4: And there is more to come, but I promise it shall be worth it. Now, face the wall - and stay absolutely still.
h8b6fbd4cgbcddg488bg95f5gfa2ad835b7d5: What do you want me to do?

hf0524830g65b3g4226gae3age163fb49b915: A pity. We would have such fun together.
